title: Vivecraft Origins Compatability Fork
description: Vivecraft Fork for compatibility with Origins mod climbing power
body:
# (THIS IS A [PULL REQUEST](https://github.com/Vivecraft/VivecraftMod/pull/212) OF VIVECRAFT THAT HAS NOT BEEN APROVED YET. IT MAY BE UNSTABLE.)

This fork/pull request adds support for Origins mod's climbing ability in VR. It gives you the ability to climb with your hands in room-scale!

Vivecraft is the mod that transforms Minecraft into an exceptional VR experience in room-scale or seated play! 

### More info: 
- https://www.vivecraft.org/
- github.com/Vivecraft/VivecraftMod/pull/212

## _Isn't Vivecraft for Forge?_
This fork only functions on fabric. We tested forge, it crashed upon joining a world with the compatability feature.

## _Can other players see my hands/What about NONVR, VSE and VFE?_

This mod also has NONVR included in the jar. VR Is disabled by default, and can be enabled in the Main menu.

For other players to see you hands you will need to have this mod and a serverside mod. The serverside extensions (VSE and VFE) work as well as fabric works with them, however you do not need to use them. This mod will run in NONVR mode on the server allowing you to see other peoples hands. Since 1.0.0 it is also customizable like the standalone server mods.

## _Does it run natively on the Quest?_
No

Sodium does work. Iris works. **Origins** works. Mod compatibility is an important thing to us, however, it is not simple. For now we focus on getting it to be stable, after which, we will work on compatibility. 
**(THIS IS A COMPILED & MODIFIED VERSION OF A PULL REQUEST THAT HAS NOT BEEN APROVED YET. IT MAY BE UNSTABLE.)**
## 
## _Other verions?_
Nope. This will only be for 1.20.1. (1.20.2-4 may work, untested.)
